'''Dyrra''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Colonel/Legends|colonel]] in command of a [[Moorja Training Installation|scout training facility]] on the plant [[Moorja/Legends|Moorja]].<ref name="G2" />
